name: Deterra Royalties Limited
analysis: DRR has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$4.4962. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$4.5121 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$4.4962, stop A$4.2125, target A$4.5800. Risk/reward is 0.30:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
